title: mapania sumatrana subsp. sumatrana
intro: Mapania sumatrana subsp. sumatrana is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. This plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and rhizomes, which contain bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mapania sumatrana subsp. sumatrana include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its traditional application in wound healing and antiseptic purposes. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are often dried and used as a decoction or infused in water to extract their medicinal properties.
